title: Vehicle Market Surveillance Unit programme results, 2024
body: "This report sets out the findings of vehicle and component testing during 2024.  The tests make sure new products put on the UK market meet legal obligations.  They’re carried out by the Vehicle Market Surveillance Unit, part of the Driver and Vehicle Standards Agency.  This year’s testing programme checked:  There’s a different report on the Vehicle Market Surveillance Unit’s 2024 emissions testing programme. "
